data.content: Implementation review rejected. 1. src/lib/agent-outcome-stats.ts resolves stats to ~/.config/foolery/logs outside development instead of persisting detailed success-rate data in the application working directory. 2. src/lib/terminal-manager.ts classifyIterationSuccess still marks terminal post-exit states as success on exit code 0, which exceeds the spec's allowed success outcomes of next queue state or prior queue state only. Validation: bunx tsc --noEmit passed; bun run test passed; bun run build passed; bun run lint did not complete because package.json runs bare eslint with no target.
